svg.title: Bedroom one memory fragment (apartment three) - softening at the edges
svg.desc: A warm bedroom that is slowly forgetting itself. Faded paint marks where things used to hang. The corner of a bed, cropped on the left: cream pillow, a small stack of folded clothes only half-folded, a faded dusty-rose duvet. A small nightstand with a dim peach-shaded lamp; behind the lamp, a framed photograph leans on the wall, but only its right edge is visible past the shade. An old pedestal fan to the right, blades turning slowly. A window past the fan with a soft afternoon view; the view changes between visits. The whole scene is washed slightly toward warm pale beige, like a photograph left out in the sun.
